description_long: This is a large, rectangular two-story house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are finished in a muted pinkish-brown color, complemented by numerous large, evenly spaced windows that provide ample natural light. The property is surrounded by manicured hedges and features a small front garden with a fountain and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. In the backyard, there is a swimming pool encircled by greenery, as well as a patio area for outdoor activities. The house includes multiple entry points, visible staircases, and rooftop access, suggesting a spacious and functional interior layout. The landscaping is lush, with several trees and shrubs enhancing the overall curb appeal.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large windows, manicured hedges, and a backyard pool. The exterior is pinkish-brown, with lush landscaping and a prominent front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, fountain, and symmetrical window arrangement with hedges and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garden, side entry, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and more windows, with lush greenery and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage area, side garden, and a clear view of the pool separated from the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, flanked by windows, a paved walkway, and a decorative fountain in a landscaped front garden.
